title: Access to Programs, Services, and Activities
description: Conroe ISD is committed to making its programs, services, and activities open to everyone, regardless of race, color, national origin, sex, disability, or other protected characteristics. The district follows federal and state laws that prohibit discrimination so that all students and community members have equal access to educational opportunities and school-sponsored activities. Parents and community members can use this policy to understand their rights and learn how to raise a concern if they believe someone has been treated unfairly.
